title: Greedy — ROI & Pattern
oneSentence: Make the locally optimal choice at each step without looking back.
description: Master the Greedy pattern. Focus on proving why local optimization leads to global optimization.

roi.signals: Max/min without overlap, 'is it possible to reach', greedy choice property.

traceSteps.title: 2. Iterate
traceSteps.text: Go through each element one by one.

traceSteps.title: 3. Feasibility Check
traceSteps.text: If the current index is beyond our max reach, we can't proceed.

traceSteps.title: 4. Greedy Choice
traceSteps.text: Update max reach to be the furthest we can go from current index.

traceSteps.title: 5. Return
traceSteps.text: If we complete the loop without failing, the end is reachable.

sandbox.question: What state do we track in Jump Game?
options: The sum of all elements seen.

sandbox.question: When do we know we failed?
options: When the current index is greater than maxReach.

followUps.q: How does this differ from Dynamic Programming?
followUps.a: Greedy makes the best local choice without exploring all options. DP explores all choices and picks the best global one.

followUps.q: How do you prove a greedy strategy works?
followUps.a: Often using proof by contradiction or by showing that any optimal solution can be transformed into the greedy solution without losing optimality.
